## Agreement between ratio and z

Cross-tab of `flag_ratio` × `flag_z` (counts of hourly rows):

| flag_ratio   |   False |   True |
|:-------------|--------:|-------:|
| False        |   46529 |   2206 |
| True         |    2562 |   1407 |

- Ratio-only: **2562** flagged hours
- Z-only:     **2206** flagged hours
- Both:       **1407** flagged hours
